meta.title: Video by jinabaobina
meta.description:
Michelin Bib Gourmand duck in LA
I kept seeing this place all over my feed and finally got to try it. I’m so glad I ordered multiple dishes because I’ve never had duck prepared in so many different ways (only had Peking duck🤣) 

My absolute favorite was the smoked duck. The depth of flavors and balance was DELICIOUS. If I came back with family, I’d definitely order the clay pot roasted duck. It feels lighter and healthier, and I know they would love it. 
But if I’m coming back just for myself, it’s 1000% for the smoked duck.

Pricing and details below:

📍 Dha Rae Ok 1106 S Western Ave Los Angeles, CA 90006 Koreatown

PRICE LIST
Roasted Duck $130 (Pre order at least 1 day in advance) stuffed with sweet potatoes, seeds, herbs
Smoked Duck $125 Sliced Duck $46 Chopped Duck $46

Kimchi fried rice and spicy duck noodle soup are included with the duck dishes and cannot be ordered separately.

🅿️ Parking lot available in the back!

#koreanfood #losangeles #lafoodie

transcript.transcript: This is the only place in the U.S. that specializes in duck like this. We tried four different duck dishes and I saved my favorite for last. First is the viral hold duck roasted in a clay pot. It's roasted for four hours and stuff with herbs. A variety of seeds, sticky rice and potatoes. Just look at this. The moment I tasted it, my first thought was, I wish my mom and grandma could taste this. I don't even know what the name of the seed is, but my grandma loves it. And this is the only restaurant I've ever seen use it. You also get these spicy noodles cooked with the duck bones. Tip, you do need to pre-order this at least one day in advance. Next is a sliced duck. I loved how flavorful it was on its own. Third is the lightly marinated chopped duck. My only rule here is patience. Wait for it to turn this color, the texture, the flavor, per faction. And the best part is if you order the sliced duck or the chopped duck, you get this kimchi fried rice that's cooked in the duck fat. Last is the smoked duck, which was my favorite. If you know me, you know how much I love blending flavors and this dish is all about that. Smoke duck dipped in the sauce's top with onions, all wrapped in pickled radish is so good. I love this experience, especially trying something completely new with my friends. I can see why Tadeok or Nameshelin bibgormond. I'll add more details in pricing in the caption. Would you try Tadeok?
